data.title: The 3-day wait to settle your stock trades is about to die, thanks to a new SEC approval you missed
data.description:
The Depository Trust Company, the U. S. financial market infrastructure provider that clears and settles securities trades, said the SEC has given it informal approval to move ahead with a tokenization service for some assets it already holds in custody, without facing enforcement action
source: https://cryptoslate.com/the-3-day-wait-to-settle-your-stock-trades-is-about-to-die-thanks-to-a-new-sec-approval-you-missed/

data.title: Ripple receives conditional approval from the USOCC to charter a national trust bank
data.description:
Ripple just took a direct step into federal banking oversight after the US Office of the Comptroller of the Currency confirmed that the company received conditional approval to form Ripple National Trust Bank, a national trust bank that will sit under federal supervision. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse posted on X that “HUGE news! @Ripple just […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-conditional-approval-from-the-usocc/

data.title: Oracle stock slips some more after OpenAI data center delays into 2028
data.description:
Oracle took another hit after word spread that several data centers tied to its massive OpenAI contract will now finish in 2028, not 2027. Reportedly, the change came from labor shortages and limits on key materials, and investors reacted fast. The stock dropped as much as 6. 5%, then traded down 5. 3% at $188. 26 on Friday. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracle-openai-data-center-delays-into-2028/

data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/interactive-brokers-begins-allowing-stablecoin-deposits-for-u-s-retail-clients/

data.title: Garantex: Russian Exchange Under Sanctions Moving Millions Under Track
data.description:

source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/russia/garantex-russian-exchange-under-sanctions-moving-millions-under-track/

data.title: Analysts boost Alphabet stock price target to $350 thanks to Gemini
data.description:
TD Cowen raised its target on Alphabet to $350, with analyst John Blackledge saying the new number reflects what he sees in the company’s artificial intelligence rollout, according to CNBC. John kept his buy rating on the Google parent and said the stronger call comes after the stock already climbed 65% this year. He wrote […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/analysts-boost-alphabet-stock-price-target/

data.title: Bitwise Pushes Back Against MSCI Move To Drop Strategy From Indexes
data.description:
Bitwise has publicly defended Strategy Inc. after MSCI proposed removing the company from its Global Investable Market Indexes, citing concerns over how digital-asset-heavy firms are being treated. In a formal statement, Bitwise said it was disappointed by MSCI’s proposal and argued that indexes should remain neutral tools designed to reflect markets, not judge business models
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitwise-pushes-back-against-msci-move-to-drop-strategy-from-indexes/

data.title: U.S. Fed Signals Lower Rates Ahead in 2026 — What Traders Need to Expect
data.description:
The U.S. Federal Reserve has indicated that it is likely to implement lower interest rates in 2026, which prompts traders to prepare and adjust their strategies accordingly. This announcement suggests a shift in monetary policy, and traders should carefully consider the potential implications for the financial markets, as well as how this anticipated change could affect investment decisions, asset valuations, and overall market sentiment in the coming years. Understanding these signals may provide valuable insights for navigating the economic landscape as the timeline approaches.
source: https://blocknews.com/u-s-fed-signals-lower-rates-ahead-in-2026-what-traders-need-to-expect/

data.title: Pyth Network Launches Monthly PYTH Buyback Program Backed by DAO Revenue
data.description:
Pyth Network will begin a monthly PYTH buyback, allocating 33% of DAO treasury revenue to open-market purchases. The program signals growing confidence in long-term network economics.
source: https://btcusa.com/pyth-network-launches-monthly-pyth-buyback-program-backed-by-dao-revenue/

data.title: Hedera Tumbles 4% as Altcoins Continue to Suffer
data.description:
Hedera, a prominent cryptocurrency in the digital asset market, experienced a significant decline of 4% in its value as the broader altcoin market continues to face challenges, leading to a wave of selling pressure among other alternative cryptocurrencies. This downturn reflects ongoing volatility and uncertainty within the crypto space, affecting investor sentiment and causing various altcoins to struggle in maintaining their market positions.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/12/12/hedera-tumbles-4-as-altcoins-continue-to-suffer

data.title: DOT Sinks 2% After Breaking Key Support
data.description:
The cryptocurrency DOT experienced a notable decline of 2% after breaching an important support level, raising concerns among investors about potential further losses and market volatility. As traders reacted to this significant technical movement, many began reevaluating their positions and strategies in light of the current market dynamics.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/12/12/dot-sinks-2-after-breaking-key-support
